test.command: cd "/home/kratos/projects/TradingAgents-CN" && .venv-mission/bin/python -m pytest tests/services/test_watch_api_baseline.py tests/services/test_watch_digest_service.py tests/services/test_mini_auth_session_boundary.py -v && npm --prefix mini run test

blockingIssues.description: mini/lib/runtime-config.js still accepts IPv4-mapped IPv6 loopback targets such as [::ffff:127.0.0.1] as non-loopback, so the publish-shell validator can still green-light a loopback-only checked-in runtime target.

mini/pages/home/index.js only rebuilds Home from session state after loadDigests() resolves, leaving an already-mounted Home surface on stale signed-out copy after in-app login or tab return while the digest request is pending.
